info.title: AI Content Detector API
info.description: AI Content Detector API. Analyzes text for statistical signals of AI generation: burstiness, vocabulary richness, passive voice density, AI phrase patterns, and paragraph uniformity. Returns a 0–100 probability score and label. No external API required — fully self-contained heuristics. Send a JSON POST request and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, authentication, and subscriptions are handled by .

post.description: Analyzes text for statistical signals of AI generation: burstiness, vocabulary richness, passive voice density, AI phrase patterns, and paragraph uniformity. Returns a 0–100 probability score and label. No external API required — fully self-contained heuristics.

text.description: The text to analyze (plain text, not HTML).
